description: Clock From block - receives clock/event signals from a CLKGOTO block via tag
name: CLKFROM
anomalies: Tag value 'A' is duplicated in exprs AND objectsParameters
objectsParameters contains ScilabString with same tag value
Command port with initialState=-1.0 (event port signature)
criticalRules: Must match with a CLKGOTO block with the same tag name
Use CLKGotoTagVisibility to manage tag scope
Can receive from multiple CLKGOTO blocks with same tag
Creates implicit connection - no visible wire needed
commonUses: Event signal routing across long distances in diagram
Connecting event signals across subsystem boundaries
Avoiding wire clutter in event-driven models
